headline: How Digital Realty’s AI-Fueled Leasing Surge And FFO Upgrade At Digital Realty Trust (DLR) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In the second quarter of 2026, Digital Realty Trust reported higher sales of US$1,145.94 million and revenue of US$1,924.04 million year over year, while net income and earnings per share declined versus the prior period. The company also raised its full-year funds-from-operations outlook after record leasing and renewals, supported by strong demand from cloud and AI customers and the planned acquisition of Blackstone’s stakes in three fully leased hyperscale data centers. With Digital...
